channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fans' Reactions Overshadow the Football Matches in Tanzania
item.description: Watching football in Tanzania no be small thing, especially when you dey follow your team for bar or at home on TV. Sometimes e better than stadium because slow-motion replays dey show the skills of t...

item.title: Rising vehicle maintenance and fuel costs challenge Nova Scotia drivers
item.description: Drivers in Nova Scotia are increasingly feeling the financial strain of vehicle ownership, with rising maintenance costs and higher gas prices affecting their budgets. Statistics Canada reports that v...

item.title: Ryan May Gets Emotional at Yeng Constantino’s Upcoming Concert
item.description: Ryan May, known for his appearances on 'It’s Showtime,' shared that he is considering showing his emotions at Yeng Constantino's much-anticipated 'Byaheng Bente' concert. During a segment on the popul...

item.title: Lucknow University Professor Arrested Over Alleged Paper Leak and Misconduct
item.description: A news report emerged regarding an incident at Lucknow University involving a professor allegedly sharing exam papers with a student and using inappropriate language. According to sources, the univers...

item.title: The Life and Controversial Legacy of Thomas Midgley Jr.
item.description: Thomas Midgley Jr., born in 1889 in Dayton, Ohio, was an influential American chemical engineer whose inventions had a profound and lasting impact on the 20th century, though often with devastating co...

item.title: Malindi Port starts direct cargo operations via SGR to Dodoma
item.description: Dar es Salaam’s Malindi area of the port has officially started handling cargo through the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR), after 99.7% of the rail works in the area were finished. This new development i...

item.title: Key Lessons from Nigeria’s Power Minister Confirmation Hearing
item.description: I attend the Senate confirmation hearing for Nigeria's new Minister of Power, Joseph O. Tegbe, and e clear say this one no be small matter at all. The hearing show say Nigeria electricity wahala no de...

item.title: Nigerian-US Forces Kill Senior ISIS Commander Linked To Dapchi Kidnapping
item.description: According to the Defence Headquarters in Abuja, Nigerian and United States forces successfully carried out a major counterterrorism operation that led to the killing of Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a top ISIS...

item.title: Waratahs secure crucial win in Fiji despite key injuries
item.description: The New South Wales Waratahs delivered a strong performance in Suva, defeating the Fijian Drua 50-35, even without their star centre Joseph-Aukuso Suaalii, who was sidelined due to hamstring tightness...

item.title: Taiwan affirms its independent status amid international tensions
item.description: Taiwan has officially declared itself as an independent nation following comments and warnings from former U.S. President Donald Trump. This statement comes amid ongoing tensions between Taiwan and Ch...

item.title: Pierce Brosnan's Rise to Fame in the 1980s: From TV Heartthrob to Future Bond
item.description: The 1980s marked a transformative decade for Pierce Brosnan, elevating him from a struggling British stage actor to a major television star in America. Born in 1953, Brosnan made early appearances in ...

item.title: Suspected Drug Queenpin Anmol Produced in Karachi Court After 22-Day Custody
item.description: KARACHI: Anmol, commonly known as Pinky, who is allegedly involved in running a drug network, appeared before the South Judicial Magistrate in Karachi after completing her initial three-day physical r...

item.title: Trump aims for measurable trade outcomes in meeting with Xi Jinping
item.description: The article intended to cover former US President Donald Trump's plans to pursue concrete trade agreements during his upcoming summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. It suggested that Trump was aim...

item.title: EcoGraf Plans Staged Expansion of Epanko Graphite Mine to Reach 390,000 tpa in Tanzania
item.description: EcoGraf Limited from Australia is pushing forward big plans for their Epanko Graphite Mine in Mahenge, Tanzania. The company done an expansion study showing a staged production growth from 73,000 tonn...

item.title: Tanzanian opposition party Chadema given deadline to explain alleged political misconduct
item.description: The Office of the Registrar of Political Parties (ORPPs) don give Chadema, one opposition party, deadline until May 20, 3.30pm, to explain why the party no should face any disciplinary action like sus...

item.title: Collection of Vintage Picturegoer Postcards Featuring European Actresses (1920s–1950s)
item.description: The Picturegoer series represents a cherished piece of film history, particularly for collectors of British cinema. Produced mainly between the 1920s and 1950s by Rotary Photographic Co. and later Bea...

item.title: Artemis II astronauts offer insights on teamwork, resilience, and managing risk
item.description: Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen, alongside his Artemis II crewmates — commander Reid Wiseman, pilot Victor Glover, and mission specialist Christina Koch — shared key lessons from their historic 10-da...

item.title: Deputy President Explains Global Factors Behind Fuel Price Increase and Government Measures
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has publicly defended the Kenya Kwanza government following the recent surge in fuel prices, attributing the rise to the ongoing conflict between Iran and the United S...

item.title: Fatima Sana appointed Pakistan Women’s Captain for T20 World Cup and Ireland Tri-Series
item.description: Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has announced its 15-member women’s squad for the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 and the upcoming tri-series in Ireland. Fatima Sana, aged 24, will lead the team for the s...

item.title: AFL D-PIC saga continues as court orders release of documents
